---
output-file: index
title: "<br> Coupling Machine Learning to Fortran using the FTorch Library"
format:
  revealjs:
    embed-resources: false
    slide-number: false
    chalkboard: false
    preview-links: auto
    history: false
    highlight-style: a11y
    code-overflow: wrap
    code-line-numbers: false
    logo: https://iccs.cam.ac.uk/sites/default/files/iccs_ucam_combined_reverse_colour.png
    theme: [dark, custom.scss]
    smaller: true
revealjs-plugins:
  - attribution
authors:
  - name: Jack Atkinson
    orcid: 0000-0001-5001-4812
    affiliations: Principal Research Software Engineer <br> ICCS - University of Cambridge
  - name: Joe Wallwork
    orcid: 0000-0002-3646-091X
    affiliations: Senior Research Software Engineer <br> ICCS - University of Cambridge
  - name: The ICCS Team and Collaborators
date: "2026-07-15"
bibliography: references.bib
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
      #title-slide .title {
        font-size: 1em;
        color: #ffffff;
      }
      #title-slide .authors {
        font-size: 0.7em;
        color: #ffffff;
      }
      #title-slide .date {
        font-size: 0.65em;
        color: #ffffff;
      }
      #title-slide .title::before {
        content: "";
        display: inline-block;
        vertical-align: middle;
        width: 220px;
        height: 100px;
        background: url('images/FTorch.svg') no-repeat center/contain;
      }
      </style>
---

## Precursors {.smaller .nostretch}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
#### Slides and Materials

The material for this workshop, including a link to the slides to follow on your own
device, can be found at:
[github.com/Cambridge-ICCS/FTorch-workshop]( https://github.com/Cambridge-ICCS/FTorch-workshop)

::: {style="text-align: center"}
{{< qrcode https://github.com/Cambridge-ICCS/FTorch-workshop qr7dekity9 width=200 height=200 >}}
:::

:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
#### Licensing

Except where otherwise noted, these presentation materials are licensed under the Creative Commons
[Attribution-NonCommercial 4.0 International](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/legalcode) ([CC BY-NC 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/)) License.

![]( https://mirrors.creativecommons.org/presskit/buttons/88x31/svg/by-nc.eu.svg ){width=40% fig-align="center"}

Vectors and icons by [SVG Repo](https://www.svgrepo.com)
under [CC0(1.0)](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/deed.en) or
[FontAwesome](https://fontawesome.com/) under [SIL OFL 1.1](http://scripts.sil.org/OFL)
:::
::::

<!-- =============================================================================== -->

{{< include _preparation.qmd >}}

<!-- =============================================================================== -->

{{< include _motivation.qmd >}}

<!-- =============================================================================== -->

{{< include _how_it_works.qmd >}}

<!-- =============================================================================== -->

## Further Information {.smaller}

For more details on the development see slides and recording from a recent talk here:
[jackatkinson.net/slides/Oxford-FTorch/](https://jackatkinson.net/slides/Leeds-N8-FTorch)

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
{{< qrcode https://jackatkinson.net/slides/Leeds-N8-FTorch hslcvu57fy width=200 height=200 >}}
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
{{< qrcode https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=je7St0t_W9Ah hfhskvhrtb width=200 height=200 >}}
:::
::::

Or, for the lastest on what's new in FTorch, see
[jackatkinson.net/slides/CESM-Jun-26](https://jackatkinson.net/slides/CESM-Jun-26)

{{< qrcode https://jackatkinson.net/slides/CESM-Jun-26 vhtifowi38 width=200 height=200 >}}

<!-- =============================================================================== -->

{{< include _installing.qmd >}}

<!-- =============================================================================== -->

{{< include _learning_objectives.qmd >}}

<!-- =============================================================================== -->

{{< include _exercise_0.qmd >}}

<!-- =============================================================================== -->

{{< include _basic_coupling.qmd >}}

<!-- =============================================================================== -->

{{< include _resnet_exercise.qmd >}}

<!-- =============================================================================== -->

{{< include _further_details.qmd >}}

<!-- =============================================================================== -->

<!-- {{< include _case_studies.qmd >}} -->

<!-- =============================================================================== -->

## Thanks for Listening {.smaller}

For more information please speak to us afterwards, or drop us a message.

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="45%"}
{{< fa pencil >}} \ Jack Atkinson

{{< fa solid envelope >}} \ [jwa34[AT]cam.ac.uk](mailto:jwa34@cam.ac.uk)

{{< fa brands github >}} \ [jatkinson1000](https://github.com/jatkinson1000)
:::
::: {.column width="10%"}
:::
::: {.column width="45%"}
{{< fa pencil >}} \ Joe Wallwork

{{< fa solid envelope >}} \ [joe.wallwork[AT]damtp.cam.ac.uk](mailto:joe.wallwork@damtp.cam.ac.uk)

{{< fa brands github >}} \ [jwallwork23](https://github.com/jwallwork23)
:::
::::

\

\

Thanks to the rest of the FTorch team and contributors.

The ICCS received support from ![](images/schmidt_science.png){height=2em style="margin: 0; vertical-align: -2%"}

FTorch has been supported by ![](images/c2d3_logo.png){height=1.4em style="margin: 0; vertical-align: -2%"}

![](images/ICCS_Cambridge_small.png){style="width: 18%;" .absolute bottom=24% right=11%}

![](images/FTorch.svg){style="width: 30%;" .absolute bottom=12% right=5%}
